faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Pelham Bay homes?
faqs.answer: Pelham Bay's proximity to Eastchester Bay and the Hutchinson River creates naturally humid conditions that attract silverfish. Many of the neighborhood's older buildings and garden-style apartments have basements, crawl spaces, and aging plumbing that create the damp environments silverfish need to survive. Our treatments address both the pests and the moisture issues that attract them.
